name: Tamale Perfection
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pork sausage according to package instructions.
2. Add ground beef and cook, removing any excess fat.
3. Mix in chopped onion, celery, green pepper, canned tomatoes, frozen corn, chili powder, and black pepper.
4. Stir in cold water and yellow corn meal until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle grated cheddar cheese (and black olives) over the top of the filling.
7. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for about 1 hour, or until heated through.
8. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
